entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A disease affecting pigeonpea, caused by pigeonpea sterility mosaic virus (PPSMV).

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop, scientifically known as Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., susceptible to Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA STERILITY MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: The virus causing Sterility Mosaic Disease in pigeonpea.

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: Reduction in the amount of crop produced, a negative consequence of Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: The geographical region where pigeonpea production is challenged by Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: SMD ISOLATES
entities.description: Different strains of the Sterility Mosaic Disease pathogen.

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: A location in India where a specific SMD isolate was characterized.

entities.name: BANGALORE
entities.description: A location in India where a specific SMD isolate was characterized.

entities.name: COIMBATORE
entities.description: A location in India where a specific SMD isolate was characterized.

entities.name: MOLECULAR TOOLS
entities.description: Techniques used to identify genomic regions associated with traits.

entities.name: SMD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea to withstand the effects of Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: GENOMIC REGIONS
entities.description: Specific areas within the genome associated with traits.

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: A technique used to identify quantitative trait loci (QTLs) linked to specific traits.

entities.name: F2 POPULATIONS
entities.description: Second filial generation populations used in genetic analysis.

entities.name: ICP 8863
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype used as a parent in the F2 population.

entities.name: ICPL 20097
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype used as a parent in the F2 population.

entities.name: TTB 7
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype used as a parent in the F2 population.

entities.name: ICP 7035
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype used as a parent in the F2 population.

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUPS
entities.description: Regions of a chromosome that tend to be inherited together.

entities.name: COMPOSITE INTERVAL MAPPING
entities.description: A statistical method used for QTL analysis.

entities.name: QTLS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci, genomic regions associated with specific traits.

entities.name: QSMD4
entities.description: A specific QTL identified for SMD resistance.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC VARIANCE
entities.description: The proportion of variation in a trait due to genetic and environmental factors.

entities.name: MARKER ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A technique for selecting plants based on their genetic markers.
